Title: Requires every sale of a bicycle with electric assist or electric scooter to include a helmet suitable for use while operating such bicycle or scooter
Summary: Requires every sale of a bicycle with electric assist or electric scooter to include a helmet suitable for use while operating such bicycle or scooter.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the vehicle and traffic law, in relation to requiring every sale of a bicycle with electric assist or electric scooter to include a helmet
